notCollectedOffDevice: Precise/background location is used on-device for foreground checks and geofencing; the current repo does not send coordinates to the backend.
Camera access is used locally for staff QR scanning; the current repo does not upload captured frames or images.
The app requests notification permission and schedules local notifications; the current repo does not register or persist a push token.

dataCollectionNotes: Disclose account email, display name, date of birth, member identifier, and referral code as linked account data used for authentication and member benefits.
Disclose private-event inquiry contact information and free-form notes if that flow ships in the reviewed binary.
Disclose crash/error telemetry for Sentry and confirm whether user identifiers are attached in production.
Do not mark precise/background location as collected unless the release build actually transmits coordinates off-device; current repo usage is on-device geofencing only.
Do not mark camera captures as collected unless staff scanner output is persisted or uploaded; current repo usage is local QR scanning only.
reviewArtifacts: Provide a staff review account if QR scanner review is required.
Provide a sample member QR payload.
manualAppStoreConnectAnswers: Privacy Policy URL must be set to https://escolife.expo.app/privacy.
Support URL must be set to https://escolife.expo.app/support.
App Review notes must explain optional background location, local camera scanning, local notifications, deep links, and the 30-day account deletion grace period.
